result.per_layer_per_slot: all 64 layers × 2 slots produce byte-identical residual bytes across reps

closure: S1.1 GREEN; Stage 1 (NP=2 self-determinism floor) closes immediately. CUDA-level determinism on identical inputs holds.
implication_for_stage_2: Stage 2 byte-identity binding criterion (NP=2 ↔ NP=4 vs the NP=2 reference) is well-defined and reproducible. Drift introduced by changing np IS the only signal — no noise floor from within-np non-determinism.
